text:
Hi,
  I found the Memcache.php is not in the 'FILES' in this patch.  Here
is the patch with this file.

Thanks.

On Tue, 17 Jul 2007 15:50:16 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
